summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Stevens Family portal redesign with luxury dark theme. Tested all major features including dashboard, navigation, individual pages, responsive design, and PWA functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: SF monogram not using Plus Jakarta Sans font - currently using Inter instead
ui_bugs.details: The sf-monogram class is applied to inner span but CSS specificity may be overridden by Tailwind

passed_tests: Dark luxury theme background (#0B0C0F) working correctly
Gold accent color (#C6A85A) applied correctly
SF monogram displays with gold border
Stevens Family title and tagline visible
Gold accent line below tagline present
All 9 dashboard tiles visible and functional
Luxury card styling with dark theme applied
Tile hover lift effect working (translateY(-4px))
Tile hover border color change to gold working
Menu toggle button functional
Menu dropdown opens and closes properly
All 6 navigation items present in dropdown
Calendar page loads with proper styling
Photos page loads with gold accent buttons
Upload page loads with instructions
Dinner, Recipes, Activities pages load successfully
Back button present on all pages
Sticky header with backdrop blur working
Mobile responsive design working
PWA manifest.json accessible
Typography using Plus Jakarta Sans for headings
Service worker registration working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix SF monogram font styling - ensure sf-monogram class uses Plus Jakarta Sans font instead of Inter. May need to increase CSS specificity or check Tailwind CSS conflicts.
success_percentage: frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, only minor font styling issue
